name: Swallow Tail Golf, LLC
address: 1380 Myerlee Country Club Blvd, Fort Myers, FL 33919
about: Swallow Tail Golf is a professional golf instruction studio in Fort Myers, FL, focused on helping golfers of all skill levels improve their game. The facility offers personalized PGA instruction, including individual lessons, group sessions, and professional coaching, utilizing a Trackman Indoor Studio for precise performance tracking. With over 20+ years of combined teaching experience from PGA professionals, the studio provides customized lessons tailored to each player's unique strengths and areas for improvement, covering all aspects of the game from swing mechanics to course etiquette and rules.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Trackman technology for precise shot data
Personalized instruction from PGA professionals with over 20 years experience
Climate-controlled indoor environment for year-round practice
Detailed performance tracking to measure improvement

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman Indoor Studio for precise performance tracking

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers should bring their own clubs for lessons. The facility does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed. BYOB is not indicated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified as the facility focuses on instruction rather than full simulation rounds.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While they offer junior instruction, the facility appears geared toward serious practice rather than a family entertainment setting.
